steps.name: Given  user is on the ParaBank login page "https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC"
When  user leaves username blank
And  user leaves password blank
And  user clicks on login button
Then  error message "Please enter a username and password" should be displayed

testCase.name: Login with empty username and password

steps.name: Given  user is on the ParaBank login page "https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC"
When  user leaves username blank
And  user leaves password blank
And  user clicks on login button
Then  error message "Please enter a username and password" should be displayed

steps.name: Given  user is on the ParaBank login page "https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC"
When  user enters invalid username "invalidUser"
And  user enters invalid password "wrongPass"
And  user clicks on login button
Then  error message "The username and password could not be verified" should be displayed
